title: phalaenopsis cornu-cervi
intro: Phalaenopsis cornu-cervi, also known as the Deer's Horn Orchid, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the Phalaenopsis genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, headache, and rheumatism due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Phalaenopsis cornu-cervi include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or capsule form, and is also used in traditional remedies to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
